creator: adox@mcx2.org
text:
Update and take maintainership for devel/synfig , devel/etl and graphics/synfigstudio

Fix: Index: Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/pcvs/ports/graphics/synfigstudio/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.6
diff -u -u -r1.6 Makefile
--- Makefile	6 Jun 2008 13:34:56 -0000	1.6
+++ Makefile	25 Dec 2008 15:05:49 -0000
@@ -6,12 +6,11 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	synfigstudio
-DISTVERSION=	0.61.08
-PORTREVISION=	1
+DISTVERSION=	0.61.09
 CATEGORIES=	graphics multimedia
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/synfig
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	adox@mcx2.org
 COMMENT=	Vector-based 2D animation software package
 
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	${LOCALBASE}/libdata/pkgconfig/ETL.pc:${PORTSDIR}/devel/etl
